svg.title: The loop that compounds — four-step co-evolution loop
svg.desc: Four panels on a circle, clockwise: 01 INITIALIZE (/daily, /resume) at twelve o'clock loads what the agent knows; 02 CAPTURE (/braindump) at three o'clock; 03 EVOLVE (/distill, /learn) at six o'clock; 04 WRAPUP (/wrapup, /recap) at nine o'clock promotes lessons to memory. Dashed arrows travel clockwise — every loop the agent starts smarter.
